Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing And Req. For Prove-Up Hearing And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Margaret E. Murray, Esq., Appearing for Plaintiff Megan Alexis Kilian.
Plaintiff Megan Alexix Kilian sworn and examined.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Jeremy Russell McKeever.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Principal $8,475.14
Interest $1,271.26
Costs $235.00
Emotional Distress $50,000.00 and Punitive Damages $50,000.00 based upon testimony of Plaintiff for a total judgment in the amount of $109,981.40.

Counsel to submit proposed Judgment and Declaration re: Amended Statement of Damages Amount.
